public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hazard reader.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a hazard reader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hazard reader in and around Shelkopolis–Plume’s End Northern Road, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis–Plume’s End Northern Road workable through the obligations of hazard reader while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Shelkopolis–Plume’s End Northern Road, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hazard reader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Letha Dawnsilk needs help with a problem in Shelkopolis–Plume’s End Northern Road that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Letha Dawnsilk can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Letha Dawnsilk carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.
